calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-28-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley.
Petitioner: Mary Stephanie Moore, present in pro per with Certified Court Sign Language Interpreter: Bobbe Skiles.
Petitioner and Sign Language Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Mary Stephanie Collins.
Decree signed in open court.

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-03-2007 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-08-2007 Off Calendar
